title: Requirements Relating to Compensation of Former DoD Officials
summary: Contractor must certify it has informed all covered DoD officials of post-employment restrictions.

title: Compliance with Safeguarding Covered Defense Information Controls
summary: Offeror represents it will implement NIST SP 800-171 security requirements when handling Covered Defense Information.

title: Safeguarding Covered Defense Information and Cyber Incident Reporting
summary: Contractor must implement NIST SP 800-171 controls for Covered Defense Information and report cyber incidents to DoD within 72 hours. Flows down to ALL subcontractors.

title: Notice of NIST SP 800-171 DoD Assessment Requirements
summary: Offeror must have a current NIST SP 800-171 self-assessment posted to SPRS (Supplier Performance Risk System) before award.

title: NIST SP 800-171 DoD Assessment Requirements
summary: Contractor must provide DoD access for higher-tier assessments and ensure subs at all tiers have current SPRS scores.

title: Cybersecurity Maturity Model Certification Requirements
summary: Contractor must achieve and maintain the CMMC level specified in the solicitation. Flows down to subs handling FCI/CUI.

title: Notice on the Use of the Supplier Performance Risk System
summary: Offerors notified that SPRS supplier risk and item risk data will be considered in source selection.

title: Only One Offer
summary: If only one offer is received, government may request cost or pricing data.

title: Small Business Subcontracting Plan (DoD Contracts)
summary: DoD-specific small business subcontracting plan requirements (in addition to FAR 52.219-9).

title: Buy American—Balance of Payments Program Certificate
summary: Offeror certifies whether end products are domestic or qualifying-country end products under DoD Balance of Payments program.

title: Buy American and Balance of Payments Program
summary: DoD contractors must deliver only domestic or qualifying-country end products unless an exception applies.

title: Export-Controlled Items
summary: Contractor must comply with ITAR and EAR for export-controlled items. Flows down to all subs handling such items.

title: Rights in Technical Data—Noncommercial Items
summary: Government rights in technical data for noncommercial items. Defines unlimited, limited, government-purpose, and SBIR rights.

title: Subcontracts for Commercial Products and Commercial Services
summary: DoD-specific limits on flow-down to commercial subcontracts. Defines which DFARS clauses must, may, and must not flow down to commercial subs.

title: Contractor Counterfeit Electronic Part Detection and Avoidance System
summary: Covered contractors must establish a counterfeit electronic part detection/avoidance system per the listed criteria.
